metadata.dataset: Helix Financial Systems ISO/IEC 27001:2022 FY2026 Findings
metadata.description: Audit findings for the Helix ISO 27001 engagement demonstrating cross-framework methodology reuse while maintaining framework-specific observations.

findings.title: Security awareness evidence did not demonstrate completion within the required timeframe
findings.observation: Security awareness evidence did not demonstrate completion within the required timeframe.
findings.risk: Control effectiveness may be reduced until remediation is completed.
findings.recommendation: Implement corrective action and perform follow-up testing.

findings.title: Patch deployment report was missing one production server
findings.observation: Patch deployment report was missing one production server.
findings.risk: Control effectiveness may be reduced until remediation is completed.
findings.recommendation: Implement corrective action and perform follow-up testing.

findings.title: Change approval documentation was not retained for a sampled deployment
findings.observation: Change approval documentation was not retained for a sampled deployment.
findings.risk: Control effectiveness may be reduced until remediation is completed.
findings.recommendation: Implement corrective action and perform follow-up testing.
findings.managementResponse: Mandatory approval validation added to deployment workflow.

findings.title: Business continuity exercise attendance sheet lacked management sign-off
findings.observation: Business continuity exercise attendance sheet lacked management sign-off.
findings.risk: Control effectiveness may be reduced until remediation is completed.
findings.recommendation: Implement corrective action and perform follow-up testing.
findings.managementResponse: Risk accepted until next annual exercise.
